assertions.expectation: Checks for deprecated API usage that may have changed behavior in 1.30
assertions.reason: The response checks for deprecated API usage but focuses on 1.31→1.32 upgrade, not 1.30 behavior changes

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking admission webhooks — they may be rejecting or slowing down requests on the new version
assertions.reason: Response includes detailed admission webhook checks with specific commands and identifies webhooks as potential cause of 503 errors and latency

assertions.expectation: Advises checking if resource requests/limits need adjusting for any system components that changed
assertions.reason: Response includes checking system component resource usage with 'kubectl top pods -n kube-system' and mentions system components may need more resources

assertions.expectation: Suggests examining kube-system pods for any that are crashlooping or restarting
assertions.reason: Response includes 'kubectl get pods -n kube-system' and specifically mentions looking for 'crashlooping or frequent restarts'

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check API server metrics and latency (kubectl get --raw /metrics)
assertions.reason: Response includes multiple 'kubectl get --raw /metrics' commands to check deprecated API usage and webhook response times

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking if NetworkPolicy or service mesh components need updating for the new version
assertions.reason: Response includes specific sections on NetworkPolicy changes and Service Mesh Compatibility with commands to check Istio/ASM

assertions.expectation: Advises reviewing pod events for scheduling delays or readiness probe failures
assertions.reason: While the response includes checking various events, it doesn't specifically mention scheduling delays or readiness probe failures

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking if HPA or VPA are behaving differently on the new version
assertions.reason: Response includes dedicated HPA/VPA section with commands to check HPA status and VPA recommendations, explicitly mentioning K8s 1.32 may have changed HPA algorithm defaults
